briefdescription.para: identifier
lower bound
upper bound (binomial, uniform)
number of segments (prior segment length distribution)
parameter (Poisson, negative binomial, Poisson geometric)
probability of success (binomial, negative binomial, Poisson geometric)
sequence length (prior segment length distribution)

memberdef.argsstring: (int iinf_bound, int isup_bound, double iparameter, double iprobability)
memberdef.name: init

briefdescription.para: Initialization of the parameters of a discrete parametric distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (discrete_parametric iident, int iinf_bound, int isup_bound, double iparameter, double iprobability)
memberdef.name: init

briefdescription.para: Initialization of the identifier and parameters of a discrete parametric distribution.
Copy of a DiscreteParametric object.

memberdef.argsstring: (int inb_value=0, discrete_parametric iident=CATEGORICAL, int iinf_bound=I_DEFAULT, int isup_bound=I_DEFAULT, double iparameter=D_DEFAULT, double iprobability=D_DEFAULT)
memberdef.name: DiscreteParametric

briefdescription.para: Constructor of the DiscreteParametric class.

memberdef.argsstring: (discrete_parametric iident, int iinf_bound, int isup_bound, double iparameter, double iprobability, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD)
memberdef.name: DiscreteParametric

briefdescription.para: Constructor of the DiscreteParametric class.

parameterdescription.para: threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Constructor of the DiscreteParametric class (prior segment length distribution).
Construction of a DiscreteParametric object from a Distribution object.
Construction of a DiscreteParametric object from a Distribution object applying a scaling operation.
Construction of an inter-event distribution from an initial inter-event distribution up- or down-scaling the time scale.
Construction of a DiscreteParametric object from a FrequencyDistribution object.
Constructor by copy of the DiscreteParametric class.
Assignment operator of the DiscreteParametric class.
Writing of the parameters of a discrete distribution.
Writing of the characteristics of a discrete parametric distribution.

parameterdescription.para: flag on the writing of the shape characteristics,

briefdescription.para: Writing of the parameters of a discrete distribution at the spreadsheet format.
Writing of the characteristics of a discrete parametric distribution at the spreadsheet format.

parameterdescription.para: flag on the writing of the shape characteristics.

briefdescription.para: Writing of the parameters of a discrete parametric distribution at the Gnuplot format.
Computation of the number of parameters of a discrete parametric distribution.
Update of the number of parameters of a discrete parametric distribution.
Computation of the theooretical mean of a discrete parametric distribution.
Computation of the theoretical variance of a discrete parametric distribution.
Computation of the theoretical coefficient of skewness of a discrete parametric distribution.
Computation of the theoretical excess kurtosis of a discrete parametric distribution: excess kurtosis = coefficient of kurtosis - 3.

Computation of the distance between 2 discrete parametric distributions (sup of the absolute difference between the cumulative distribution functions in the case of non-crossing cumulative distribution functions; in the general case, sum of sup on intervals between 2 crossings of cumulative distribution functions).
Computation of the probability mass function of a binomial distribution.
Computation of the probability mass function of a Poisson distribution. The number of values is determined using a threshold on the cumulative distribution function or using a predefined bound.

parameterdescription.para: threshold on the cumulative distribution function,

briefdescription.para: Computation of the probability mass function of a negative binomial distribution. The number of values is determined using a threshold on the cumulative distribution function or using a predefined bound.

parameterdescription.para: threshold on the cumulative distribution function,

briefdescription.para: Computation of the probability mass function of a Poisson geometric distribution. The number of values is determined using a threshold on the cumulative distribution function or using a predefined bound.

parameterdescription.para: threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Computation of the probability mass function of a discrete uniform distribution.
Computation of the prior segment length distribution corresponding to the assumption of a uniform prior distribution for the possible segmentations.

Computation of the probability mass function of a parametric discrete distribution (binomial, Poisson, negative binomial, uniform compound Poisson geometric, prior segment length distribution for a multiple change-point model).

parameterdescription.para: threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Simulation using the rejection sampling method. Principle: A point (x, Px) is drawn in the rectangle [xmin, xmax] x [0. ,Pmax]. If the point is below the distribution, the x value is kept; If not, a new point is drawn.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Forward &forward_dist, const FrequencyDistribution &within, const FrequencyDistribution &backward, const FrequencyDistribution &forward, const FrequencyDistribution *no_event) const
memberdef.name: renewal_likelihood_computation

briefdescription.para: Computation of the log-likelihood of a discrete-time renewal process for time interval data.

parameterdescription.para: observation period frequency distribution for the case of no event.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FrequencyDistribution &within, const FrequencyDistribution &backward, const FrequencyDistribution &forward, const FrequencyDistribution *no_event, Reestimation< double > *inter_event_reestim, Reestimation< double > *length_bias_reestim, int iter) const
memberdef.name: expectation_step

briefdescription.para: Computation of the reestimation quantities corresponding to the inter-event distribution (EM algorithm of an equilibrium renewal process estimated on the basis of time interval data).

parameterdescription.para: observation period frequency distribution for the case of no event,
pointer on the reestimation quantities of the inter-event distribution
pointer on the reestimation quantities of the length-biased distribution,

briefdescription.para: Computation of the log-likelihood of a state occupancy distribution of an ordinary semi-Markov chain.

parameterdescription.para: frequency distribution of complete sojourn times,
frequency distribution of right-censored sojourn times.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Forward &forward, const FrequencyDistribution &sojourn_time, const FrequencyDistribution &initial_run, const FrequencyDistribution &final_run, const FrequencyDistribution &single_run) const
memberdef.name: state_occupancy_likelihood_computation

briefdescription.para: Computation of the log-likelihood of a state occupancy distribution of an equilibrium semi-Markov chain.

parameterdescription.para: frequency distribution of complete sojourn times,
frequency distribution of left-censored sojourn times,
frequency distribution of right-censored sojourn times,
frequency distribution of sequence lengths for the case of a single visited state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FrequencyDistribution &sojourn_time, const FrequencyDistribution &final_run, Reestimation< double > *occupancy_reestim, int iter) const
memberdef.name: expectation_step

briefdescription.para: Computation of the reestimation quantities of a state occupancy distribution (EM estimator of an ordinary semi-Markov chain).

parameterdescription.para: frequency distribution of complete sojourn times,
frequency distribution of right-censored sojourn times,
pointer on the reestimation quantities of the state occupancy distribution,

memberdef.argsstring: (const FrequencyDistribution &sojourn_time, const FrequencyDistribution &initial_run, const FrequencyDistribution &final_run, const FrequencyDistribution &single_run, Reestimation< double > *occupancy_reestim, Reestimation< double > *length_bias_reestim, int iter, bool combination=false, duration_distribution_mean_estimator mean_estimator=COMPUTED) const
memberdef.name: expectation_step

briefdescription.para: Computation of the reestimation quantities of a state occupancy distribution (EM estimator of an equilibrium semi-Markov chain).

parameterdescription.para: frequency distribution of complete sojourn times,
frequency distribution of left-censored sojourn times,
frequency distribution of right-censored sojourn times,
frequency distribution of sequence lengths for the case of a single visited state,
pointer on the reestimation quantities of the state occupancy distribution,
pointer on the reestimation quantities of the length-biased distribution,
combination or not of the reestimation quantities,
method for the computation of the mean of the state occupancy distribution.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, std::ifstream &in_file, int &line, discrete_parametric last_ident=NEGATIVE_BINOMIAL, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD, int min_inf_bound=0)
memberdef.name: parsing

briefdescription.para: Analysis of the format of a DiscreteParametric object.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,
identifier of the last distribution in the list,
threshold on the cumulative distribution function,

memberdef.argsstring: (discrete_parametric ident, int inf_bound, int sup_bound, double parameter, double probability, double cumul_threshold=CUMUL_THRESHOLD)
memberdef.name: nb_value_computation

briefdescription.para: Computation of the number of values of a parametric discrete distribution (binomial, Poisson, negative binomial, uniform, compound Poisson geometric, prior segment length distribution for a multiple change-point model).

parameterdescription.para: upper bound of the support (binomial or uniform distribution),
threshold on the cumulative distribution function.

briefdescription.para: Discrete parametric distribution.
